mechanism: The debunking of expansionary austerity removes the theoretical justification for rapid spending cuts producing positive growth outcomes. DOGE-style cuts should be expected to be contractionary, with the only question being magnitude.
regime_dependence: If DOGE cuts genuinely target waste (zero-multiplier spending), the expansionary austerity debunking is less relevant. The ratio of genuine efficiency to contractionary cuts is unknowable ex ante.
